text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Everyone sure is running hard...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You're not going to join?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Well... I'm making new nail tips.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Wait, don't tell me your toenails got worse...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no, this is just, like... something my trainer
told me to do.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm supposed to watch people run and make nail
tips that express them or whatever.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? That's it? I mean, I'm cool with it, but...
choice_data_list: Yeah, just be sure to observe carefully.
Yeah, just be sure to observe carefully.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the races ahead, Jordan is going to need to
study her opponents carefully. But meticulously
poring over race footage might be a bit much at
first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'd like to start by developing her
observation skills.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having her depict what she sees in some form will
improve her perceptiveness.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Huh. Well, your trainer certainly thinks outside
the box.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Right? I never get told to just like, study, which is
fine by me. Plus, I get more nail tips. Win-win.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Heh, pretty sure what you're doing counts as
studying, though... Anyway, why don't you
"observe" me?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... City's form is so cool... The way she hits
the turf and...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh! City is so pretty!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Well, she is an amazing runner. Just keeps going, unbothered by anything. Like... a straight line? And there's definitely glitter in there too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Jordan paints, I look into the classic-year
runners she'll soon be up against. I thought Triple
Crown contenders would be the place to start,
but...
choice_data_list: Seems the Tiara tour is getting a lot of press...
Seems the Tiara tour is getting a lot of press...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the magazines are raving about the star
rookies vying for the Tiara this year. As for the
Triple Crown...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yo. Five nail tips done. Pretty good, right?
choice_data_list:
Looks like you've been observing everyone
closely!

Looks like you've been observing everyone
closely!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Mhm. Oh, that magazine...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Shes kind of a big deal, right? The girl on the
cover. Everyone was fawning over her on the
track the other day.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But a whole special feature in a magazine? She
must be something else. I mean, people can't stop
talking about the Tiara now.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, it's like the Triple Crown doesn't even
exist. Literally no one cares this year.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Like, why? Does the Classic Triple Crown not get
enough clicks or something?
choice_data_list: I don't think that's it...
I don't think that's it...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ugh, whatever. I don't get it. Back to nail tips.
choice_data_list: We've got training in half an hour.
We've got training in half an hour.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I know.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Everyone's still running. Go, go, go!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh hey, it's Palmer and Helios. Those two haven't
gotten any slower.

text_block_list.name: Palmer and Helios
text_block_list.text:
Explooosion!
Demon speed! ☆

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Sheesh... There go Leader Dum and Leader Dee
of Arima fame...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, everyone's watching. That's hilarious. I
better take a video.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
Oh, are Palmer and Helios trying to out-front-run
each other again? Wow.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume D
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, I wouldn't even mind if someone
gapped me like that. It'd actually be kinda cool.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Palmer has like... two grand prix wins? Arima
and... the other one.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
And Helios won some race twice in a row or
something. City is amazing too, of course.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Everyone's getting so much attention.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Everyone but me.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! I'm going all out from the first lap today!
Watch me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As soon as training begins, Tosen Jordan takes
off with a lot more vigor than usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's also holding her head higher than usual. It
reminds me of...
choice_data_list: Mejiro Palmer's running...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Well? Did I get faster?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe because she experimented with her form,
her time actually dropped a bit.
choice_data_list:
What do you think are the advantages of that
form?

What do you think are the advantages of that
form?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: The advantages?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer tends to hold her head high, which
doesn't mesh well with Jordan's style.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Palmer's style is marked by the fierceness to fight
till the end, even when she's in the lead and the
only rival around is herself.
choice_data_list:
Your way of running has its own strengths
unique to you.

Your way of running has its own strengths
unique to you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...It does?
choice_data_list: Of course. What do you think they are?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Do you mean, like... wanting to win?
choice_data_list: That's right.
That's right.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...Okay, but that's so vague. I need some actual
strengths, don't I?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...I don't understand.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I just don't get it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's growing, whether she knows it or not. That
she's able to pick up on other styles and imitate
them is proof of that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she takes the time to think and put those
observations to use, she'll grow even more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Training goes on as usual, until...

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text: Hey there, Trainer! How is Tosen Jordan doing?
choice_data_list: We're exploring her strengths right now.

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! She must really be improving, then! Sounds
like we'll be seeing the fruits of all that labor at
the Satsuki Sho...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ack!
choice_data_list: Jordan?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Ngh.
choice_data_list: Are you okay?!
Are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: M-my toenail... Ow...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Beads of sweat are forming on her face. It looks
like she's in a lot of pain.
choice_data_list: S-somebody call an ambulance!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As soon as the ambulance arrives, we carry her on
board and set off for the hospital.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wee woo wee woo...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her face only grows paler and paler during the
ride.
